dvids.title: Montana National Guard hosts historic 163rd transformation ceremony
dvids.desc: The Montana Army National Guard redesignated the 1st Battalion, 163rd Cavalry Regiment as the 1st Battalion, 163rd Infantry Regiment during a transformation ceremony at Fort Harrison, Montana, May 27, 2026. The ceremony honored more than a century of service and recognized the battalion’s transition
dvids.unit_name: Montana National Guard Public Affairs Office
